title: YoYo animation keeps running after the target View is detached
body: YoYo.with(Techniques.Pulse).duration(1000).repeat(YoYo.INFINITE).playOn(view) never stops if the Activity/Fragment hosting `view` is destroyed before the animator is cancelled explicitly, leaking the ValueAnimator and holding a reference to the View through the animator's target field.

title: No helper to cancel YoYo animations bound to RecyclerView items on scroll
body: When Techniques are applied to RecyclerView row views, recycled view holders keep replaying old animations because there's no built-in way to look up and cancel the YoYo animator bound to a specific View before rebinding it. Could YoYo expose a registry keyed by View for this?

title: How do I combine two Techniques on the same view?
body: I want to run Bounce and FadeIn on the same view simultaneously, but YoYo.with(Techniques technique) only accepts a single technique per AnimationComposer. Is chaining BaseViewAnimator subclasses supported, or is running two separate YoYo instances on the same target the intended approach?

title: Custom pivot (CENTER_PIVOT) ignored by ShakeAnimator
body: Setting `.pivot(YoYo.CENTER_PIVOT, YoYo.CENTER_PIVOT)` works for Bounce/Pulse but ShakeAnimator still appears to rotate/translate around the view's default top-left pivot, suggesting the sentinel isn't being applied consistently for every attention animator.
